author: lOrm
content:
Verified already fixed in commit e5526f1a (resolved 634 strict-clippy diagnostics including all 9 float_cmp sites). The 7 sites cited in this issue all use epsilon comparisons:

- src/compaction.rs:1348,1727 -> (config.threshold - COMPACTION_THRESHOLD).abs() < f32::EPSILON
- src/config/vdd.rs:284,287,329,332 -> (x - 0.3_f32).abs() < f32::EPSILON pattern
- src/vdd/confabulation.rs:253,267,283,296,301,315,316 -> .abs() < f64::EPSILON / domain epsilon

Forensic evidence (no source changes needed in this pass):
  grep -rn -E '== ?0\.0|== ?1\.0|f32 ==|f64 ==' src/   -> 0 hits
  cargo test --lib                                       -> 1283 passed (>= baseline 1277)
  cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features              -> exit 0
  strict clippy (-D pedantic -D nursery -D cargo)        -> exit 0

No #[allow], no clippy.toml additions, no #[ignore].
